query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "physisforcing: physics reinforced world simulator for robotic manipula" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it presents a foundational model (Gemini Robotics) that directly addresses the core mechanism of the user's query: using large multimodal models to reinforce physical world simulation and robotic manipulation. It provides the necessary empirical baseline and canonical reference for the "Physics Reinforced" aspect of the user's proposed follow-up work, even if it does not implement the specific "PhysisForcing" algorithm.
